description: Style NoteFall in love with these oh-so-adorable pair of booties from Madagascar for your little one. They aren't just for the winter, put them on your baby's feet when you're taking her to the crèche in the early mornings or to keep her from the chill at an evening dinner out. We recommend you buy these in more than just one colour to match all her different onesies!Product DetailsBaby pink booties with mildly elasticated and fold-able cuffs and print on the soleMaterial and CareSoft, blended fabricWash with like coloursDry immediately after was
